channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tropical Storm Bertha moves off Louisiana, heads toward Texas. Track its path.
item.description: Tropical Storm Bertha is the second named storm of the Atlantic hurricane season.

item.title: EU imposes $1 billion fine on Google over Play store and search practices
item.description: The European Union fined Google $1 billion for violating digital antitrust rules.

item.title: Rubio says Iran will 'pay a price' when asked about potential US escalation
item.description: President Trump announced major joint U.S.-Israeli strikes against Iran on Feb. 28.

item.title: US boosts military capacity as Iran conflict expands to Jordan and Red Sea
item.description: The US sends more heavy bombers and refueling planes to the Middle East as hostilities with Iran intensify.
